usage.rtk: Prefer ~/.terrain/bin/rtk if executable; else bunx @terrain-ai/rtk or npx @terrain-ai/rtk
usage.codegraph: Prefer ~/.terrain/bin/codegraph if executable; else bunx codegraph; index under .codegraph/
usage.terrain: Prefer ~/.terrain/bin/terrain if executable; else bunx @terrain-ai/cli or npx @terrain-ai/cli
